mapper.select: SELECT 0 AS STR_SEQ, r.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, r.SSPS_DL_ID, r.RPR_RSN_CNTNT, r.DOBT_DL_GRD_CD, r.REG_ID, r.REG_DT, r.UPD_ID, r.UPD_DT, c.DL_P_RNMCNO, c.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, c.INST_ID, a.DL_AMT FROM NIC67B r JOIN NIC66B c ON c.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = r.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND c.SSPS_DL_ID = r.SSPS_DL_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SUM(DL_AMT) AS DL_AMT FROM NIC75B GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID ) a ON a.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = r.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND a.SSPS_DL_ID = r.SSPS_DL_ID WHERE r.SSPS_DL_ID = #{strId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC67B SET RPR_RSN_CNTNT = #{suspRsn}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{strNo}
